entities.name: Worker
entities.context: Role in build/workflow system that performs tasks and reports status to coordinator

entities.name: Coordinator
entities.context: Role in build/workflow system that manages workers and signals dependencies

entities.name: Status File
entities.context: File at worker_updates/wN_status.md used by workers to report progress, blockers, and next steps

entities.name: Dependency Signal
entities.context: File-based mechanism where coordinator drops signals into worker_inputs/wN/ to trigger workers

relationships.context: Workers report status to coordinator; coordinator signals dependencies to workers
Workers update status file at every major milestone with progress and blockers
Coordinator drops dependency completion signals into worker input directories
